Seo.title: IDA — Enterprise Decision & Digital Workforce Operating System
Seo.description: IDA connects your entire organization — accounts, people, projects, and decisions — so teams across the company can work with clarity.
Seo.ogTitle: IDA — See Your Organization. Work with Clarity.

hero.title: IDA connects your entire organization — so everyone can work with clarity.
hero.subtitle: One place to see accounts, people, projects, and decisions — updated from real business activity across the company.

what.question: What is IDA?
what.answer: IDA is the system that brings together everything happening across your organization — accounts, people, projects, and decisions — in one shared place.

who.question: Who uses IDA?
who.answer: Teams across the company who need shared context to do their work effectively — not just executives.

whyNot.question: Why not ChatGPT or Copilot?
whyNot.answer: Those tools help individuals. IDA creates shared memory for the whole organization and surfaces what each team needs.

outcome.question: What do you get?
outcome.answer: A live, connected view of your organization so teams can see what matters and act faster.

enterprise.label: Enterprise-ready
enterprise.detail: Built for regulated industries — energy, telecom, and infrastructure.

human.label: Humans in control
human.detail: IDA recommends. People decide. Every action has an owner.

audit.label: Full audit trail
audit.detail: Every briefing, decision, and change is recorded and traceable.

demo.title: What you will see in the demo
demo.subtitle: Three minutes. One story. No setup required.

executiveBrief.title: Executive Brief
executiveBrief.desc: What needs attention today — issues, risks, and recommended actions.

livingOrganization.title: Living Organization
livingOrganization.desc: How accounts, people, and projects connect across your business.

knowledge.title: Organizational Knowledge
knowledge.desc: Everything IDA knows about an account — emails, meetings, decisions.

whoFor.title: IDA is built for companies that want everyone aligned with the same clarity.
whoFor.subtitle: From leadership to operational teams — anyone who needs to understand context, risks, and next steps without digging through scattered information.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how IDA ("IDA", "we") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our AI chatbot service.

blocks.label: Account data:
blocks.text: When you sign in with Google, we receive basic profile information such as name, email address, profile picture, and user identifier (user ID) through Supabase Auth.

blocks.label: Conversation data:
blocks.text: Messages you send and assistant responses, chat history, session titles, and UI preferences (theme, language, voice settings) are stored to provide the service and synchronize across devices.

blocks.label: Technical data:
blocks.text: API request logs (model, provider, tokens, status), IP address for rate limiting, and session metadata for security and operational analytics.

blocks.label: File uploads:
blocks.text: Images or PDFs you attach are processed for text extraction (OCR) and are not stored permanently unless they become part of your conversation history.

items: Provide, maintain, and improve the IDA chat service.
Synchronize your chat history across devices.
Process AI requests, knowledge base retrieval (RAG), and voice features.
Prevent abuse, spam, and security violations.
Comply with legal obligations and respond to valid requests.

blocks.text: Data is stored on Supabase infrastructure (database and authentication). Chat history is retained as long as the account is active or until you delete it. We may delete inactive data after a reasonable period according to internal policy.

We use Supabase Auth session cookies and browser local storage (localStorage/sessionStorage) for theme, UI preferences, and configuration caching. Essential cookies are required for login and session functionality.
IDA integrates with the following providers that process data according to their own policies:

items: Supabase — authentication, database, and session storage.
Google — OAuth login and AI models (Gemini) for chat, embeddings, OCR, and transcription.
Groq — speech transcription (optional, if configured).
xAI / OpenAI / Hugging Face — alternative AI models or TTS (if enabled by administrators).
Vercel — application hosting.

blocks.text: Conversation content may be sent to AI model providers to generate responses. Do not share sensitive information (passwords, OTPs, critical medical data) through chat.

We implement reasonable measures to protect data, including encryption in transit (HTTPS), OAuth-based authentication, and database access limited to server-side. No system is 100% secure; use the service with awareness of the risks.
You can:

items: Access and update your profile through the Account page.
Delete chat history from within the application.
Request account deletion by contacting the service administrator.
Stop using the service at any time.

blocks.text: We may update this policy at any time. Material changes will be noted on this page with the update date. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated policy.
For privacy questions, contact the IDA administrator through official organizational channels.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: By accessing or using IDA ("IDA", "the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.

blocks.text: IDA is an AI-powered digital assistant that provides conversations, knowledge base retrieval (RAG), voice input, Worksheet, Web Search, Research, Map, and related features. The service is intended to assist with general information and does not replace professional advice (medical, legal, financial, etc.).

items: You must sign in with a valid Google account.
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your session and devices.
You agree to provide accurate information and not misuse other users' accounts.
We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

blocks.text: You agree not to:

items: Use the service for illegal, harmful, or misleading activities.
Send spam, malware, or content that violates third-party rights.
Attempt to access other users' systems, APIs, or data without permission.
Bypass technical limitations (rate limits, authentication, etc.).
Use AI output for critical decisions without independent verification.

blocks.text: IDA responses are generated by AI models and may be inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated. You are responsible for evaluating and verifying information before taking action. We do not guarantee the accuracy, availability, or suitability of responses for any particular purpose.

The name, logo, interface, and source code of IDA are protected by applicable law. You may not copy, modify, or distribute any part of the service without written permission, except as permitted by the project's open-source license (if any).
You retain rights to the content you submit. By using the service, you grant us a limited license to process that content to provide and improve the service.

IDA relies on third-party services (Supabase, Google, Groq, and other model providers as configured). Their availability and terms apply separately. We are not responsible for disruptions caused by third parties.

To the extent permitted by law, IDA and its operators are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from use of the service, including loss of data, business interruption, or decisions made based on AI output.
Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid for the service in the last 12 months, or zero if the service is provided for free.
We may modify, suspend, or terminate the service at any time. You may stop using the service by signing out and no longer accessing the application.
These terms may be updated. The last update date is listed above. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated terms.
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia, without regard to conflict of law provisions, unless otherwise required by applicable regulations.
Questions regarding the terms of service may be submitted through official IDA administrator channels.
